title: We Built a Tool to Predict Runaway LLM Costs (Before They Kill Your Margins)
abstract: Are you frustrated by soaring costs of large language models? Don't worry; we've built a tool to predict runaway LLM expenses before they eat into your margins. More than just a tool, it's your profit guardian. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也在为大模型成本飙升而烦恼？别怕，我们建了个工具，帮你预测那些“失控”的费用，提前让你的利润喘口气！这不仅仅是个工具，更是你的利润守护者。赶紧试试吧！
